meta.note: Single source of truth for resume data. Used by both the portfolio website and the Typst PDF template.

summary: Full-stack engineer with 3+ years shipping production FinTech end-to-end. Built two 0-to-1 SaaS platforms at Relianz (Easytax + business registration) now serving 100+ enterprise subscribers and 500+ SMB clients. Stack: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Go. Owns features from schema design and API contracts to interaction detail and E2E tests.

experience.subtitle: FinTech SaaS platforms for business registration and cloud accounting (Easytax)
highlights: Built two SaaS products from 0 to 1 alongside matching admin back-offices, then became sole frontend owner after the first year — now serving 100+ enterprise Easytax subscribers and 500+ business registration clients
Designed and built a precision tax calculation engine for voucher logging, salary slips, and labor payment forms feeding downstream tax filings
Delivered full-stack subscription payment flow with Go + ECPay, turning Easytax into a recurring-revenue product
Introduced a Spec-Driven Development workflow with Claude Code, incrementally refactoring legacy code into a layered architecture (Logic / Validation / UI / Service) during feature work
Established E2E testing with Playwright and bilingual component documentation, adopted as team standards

experience.subtitle: Web presence for DailyVal, a Valorant community iOS app with 1M+ downloads
highlights: Designed and shipped social.dailyval.com end-to-end, extending the native iOS community to the web via Apple CloudKit as the backend of record
Following the launch, was trusted to take over the main dailyval.com marketing site and rebuild it from the ground up
Implemented i18n multi-language support, infinite scroll, and system-synced dark mode as the sole web engineer on both properties
Revamped account management and testing systems; built cross-platform mobile apps with React Native serving Android and iOS from a shared codebase
Managed application state with Redux and React Hooks; integrated RESTful APIs across web and mobile clients

projects.name: DailyVal Social
projects.tagline: A modern social platform for the DailyVal iOS ecosystem
projects.description: A modern social platform designed for iOS App ecosystem with Apple CloudKit as backend storage solution. Features seamless iCloud integration, multi-language support, and responsive design.
features: Apple CloudKit Integration - Native iOS ecosystem support
Modern UI/UX - Radix UI + Tailwind CSS design system
Responsive Design - Perfect for desktop, tablet, and mobile
Infinite Scroll - Smooth content loading experience

education.degree: B.S. in Engineering and Computer Science
highlights: Vice Director of iOSClub — ran weekly workshops teaching Swift Playgrounds and SwiftUI fundamentals
Teaching Assistant, iOS App Programming course (Sep 2021 – Dec 2021)
